sentences.english: It's time to · move on.
She · set out to prove everyone wrong.
sentences.russian: Она · поставила цель доказать всем неправоту.

sentences.english: The police · ran him in for questioning.
I · warmed to her almost immediately.
sentences.russian: Я · проникся к ней почти сразу.

sentences.english: We got · cut off in the middle of the call.
Can I · tag along with you guys?
Can you · fill me in on what happened?
sentences.russian: Можешь · ввести меня в курс произошедшего?

sentences.english: Just · carry on — don't stop.
It's time to · do away with this rule.
They · brought in a specialist for this.
Can you · back me up on this?
This could · bring down the entire company.
He finally · asked her out.
sentences.russian: Он наконец · пригласил её на свидание.

sentences.english: Stress really · brings out the worst in him.
What's · going on here?
· Bring over some food if you can.
I can't · keep up with all the changes.
sentences.russian: Я не могу · угнаться за всеми изменениями.

sentences.english: She · takes after her father.
They · broke up after three years.
What · brought about this change?
She · moved on after the breakup.
He · set out to build something different.
sentences.russian: Он · поставил цель создать что-то иное.

sentences.english: He got · run in after the incident.
He · warms to people very slowly.
sentences.russian: Он очень медленно · проникается к людям.

sentences.english: He · cut me off without any warning.
Her little brother · tagged along as usual.
sentences.russian: Её младший брат · увязался следом, как обычно.

sentences.english: · Fill me in later — I missed the meeting.
sentences.russian: · Введи меня в курс потом — я пропустил встречу.

sentences.english: She · carried on despite everything.
sentences.russian: Она · продолжала несмотря ни на что.

sentences.english: They · did away with the old system.
We need to · bring in someone with experience.
sentences.russian: Нам нужно · привлечь кого-то с опытом.

sentences.english: He always · backs me up in meetings.
sentences.russian: Он всегда · поддерживает меня на встречах.

sentences.english: The scandal · brought down the government.
Just · ask him out already.
sentences.russian: Просто · пригласи его на свидание уже.

sentences.english: She · brings out the best in people.
Can someone explain what's · going on?
She · brought over a bottle of wine.
It's hard to · keep up with the news.
He · takes after his mum completely.
sentences.russian: Он · похож на маму во всём.

sentences.english: Did you hear? They · broke up last week.
sentences.russian: Ты слышал? Они · расстались на прошлой неделе.

sentences.english: The talks · brought about a peaceful agreement.
